title: araliaceae
intro: The Araliaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the ivy family, which includes over 1,500 species of plants such as ivy, ginseng, and astilbe. These plants are typically woody or herbaceous, with compound leaves and small, often inconspicuous flowers. Many species within the Araliaceae family are adapted to a range of environments, from tropical forests to temperate woodlands. The family is known for its diverse range of species, many of which have medicinal or ornamental value.
